aka: The House of a Hundred Flowers

cast.name: 沃拉娜特·旺萨莞 Woranuch Wongsawan
阿察达乌特·伦松通 Atsadawut Luengsuntorn
克林凯·乌汉曼 Kriengkrai Oonhanun
端岛·扎鲁金达 Duangdao Jarujinda
普利亚达·西塔才 Preeyada Sitthachai

this_title: บ้านร้อยดอกไม้
trans_title: The House of a Hundred Flowers
introduction: Pattalee is a beautiful and talented girl who is studying abroad as a fashion designer. In addition, she has a large and friendly family. But the irreparable happens... In a very short period of time, Pattalee loses her loved ones one by one. They were an obstacle to taking over their business. Now Pattalee has to find out what is really happening. Who is a friend and who is a foe?
foreign_title: บ้านร้อยดอกไม้
